## ViolationOptions

<GenerationInfo sourceFile="packages/ratelimit/src/types.ts" sourceLine="168" packageName="@commandkit/ratelimit" />

Escalation settings for repeated violations.

```ts title="Signature"
interface ViolationOptions {
    escalate?: boolean;
    maxViolations?: number;
    escalationMultiplier?: number;
    resetAfter?: DurationLike;
}
```
